reason: Frontend shell option UI changes must follow project frontend quality rules.
Shell keys and option constants require precise TypeScript literal typing.
Rust/Tauri backend shell mapping changes must keep command signatures stable and pass cargo check.
Terminal shell changes must not break runtime monitoring behavior for PowerShell/pwsh tabs.
The feature spans UI option constants, frontend normalization, persisted shell keys, and Rust launch mapping.
SHELL_OPTIONS and shell normalization are shared constants/utilities; avoid duplicating shell option logic.
